job_summary: A Clinical Data Reviewer analyzes clinical trial data to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with protocols.
key_responsibilities: Review clinical data for discrepancies and errors
Perform data cleaning and query management
Collaborate with data management and biostatistics teams
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Biostatistics / Pharmacy
career_path: Data Reviewer → Clinical Data Manager → Biostatistician
skills_required: collaborate with data management and biostatistics teams
perform data cleaning and query management
review clinical data for discrepancies and errors
